validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

coverage_baseline.notes: All 2261 tests pass as of 2026-03-21. Several PRs merged since last run. New PR for teardown fix created 2026-03-21.

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Affects parse_skill_file and parse_primitive_file calls when run in full suite with coverage. Not a new issue. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: 7 ANSI failures fully resolved as of 2026-03-16. No longer a concern.
config_bug_note: set_auto_integrate/get_auto_integrate were missing from apm_cli/config.py - fixed in PR 2026-03-19. apm config set/get auto-integrate would throw ImportError at runtime without this fix.

testing_backlog.notes: PR #221 open. Remaining: display/formatting paths requiring distributed compiler stack
PR created 2026-03-21, closes #185. Replaced gc.collect+sleep with shutil.rmtree(ignore_errors=True).

open_test_assist_prs.title: test: add unit tests for AgentsCompiler (65%->82%)
fix(tests): strip ANSI codes before plain-text assertions
tests: improve coverage for security scanner and audit command
[Test Improver] test: add unit tests for utils/console.py (58% -> 90%)
[Test Improver] test: add unit tests for config command (22% -> 100%) + fix missing functions
[Test Improver] test: add unit tests for RuntimeManager and runtime CLI
[Test Improver] test: replace gc.collect+sleep teardown with shutil.rmtree(ignore_errors=True)

completed_work.description: Task4: all 7 open TI PRs have passing CI. Task3: fixed gc.collect+sleep teardown pattern in 5 test files (closes #185). 2261 tests passing.
Added 53 tests for runtime/manager.py (49%->90%) and commands/runtime.py (20%->92%). 2157 passing.
